hero.title: Lomba mudimu wa diambuluishangana
hero.lead: Tshibambalu tshia IATF tshidi tshikonkonona dilomba dia kuenza midimu idi itangila mushindu wa kupeta bantu idi ifumina ku dijinga dilelela.
support: Kuena dijinga ne malu a bungi to, kadi bidi bikengela anu kumanya bimpe muntu udi bualu ebu butangila ne bua tshinyi budi ne mushinga.

actions.label: Kuenza mudimu ne Discord pamutu pa kuenza nanku

intro: Mishindu yonso ya luendu itu ilonda malu a muomumue.

items.label: Site wa Enternete
items.body: Enza mudimu ne dibeji didi kuinshi eku bua kufila dilomba didi ne malu masunguluke.

items.label: Enternete
items.body: Tuma dilomba edi buludiludi kudi: {{contact.requestsEmail}}Malu adibu balomba ku diambuluisha dia Enternete adi mua kulua mikanda ya bantu bonso panyima pa bamane kuakonkonona ne kuakajilula.

items.label: Dishilangana
items.body: Bikalabi bipepele bua kutuadija muaba eu, dilomba edi didi ditungunuka anu ne kutangila muaba umue.

guidance.title: Kumpala kua wewe kutuma dilomba
paragraphs: Malu adibu balomba adi mua kuikala mu tshikoso ne kuapatulabu bu mikanda idibu balombe bantu bonso mu tshibambalu tshia IATF GitHub, mu site eu, anyi mu bionso bibidi.

Kuambi adresi ya muntu, nimero ya telefone, malu a luondapu anyi malu adi atangila muntu yonso udi wenza mudimu ne biamu bidi biambuluisha to, anu bikalabi ne mushinga ne wewe musue bua bena tshibambalu tshia IATF bakonkonone malu aa.
Tshibambalu tshidibu babikila ne: IATF tshidi tshiumbusha malu adi kaayi ne mushinga adi atangila muntu kumpala kua kupatula mukanda wa dilomba.

review.title: Dikonkonona malu adibu batekemene
paragraphs: Kufila dilomba kakuena kujadika ne: nebakuitabe to.

Tshibambalu tshia IATF tshidi tshikonkonona malu adibu balomba bua kumona ni adi makumbane bua kuenza mudimu kampanda, ni adi mua kukumbana, ne a mushinga, ne ni mudimu au udi ne bua kuikala mu tshilaminu tshia mikanda tshia bantu bonso.
Badi mua kubenga amue malu adibu balombe, kuangataku dîba dikuabu, anyi kuashintulula kumpala kua kubitaba.

fields.name: mulombodi
fields.label: Dîna diebe anyi dia bulongolodi buebe

fields.name: Mushindu wa kutuilangana
fields.label: Njila wa kumonangana nende udibu basue
fields.helper: Mmushindu kayi udi malu adibu balonda ne bua kuenzeka?

fields.name: Malu adibu mua kutuambila
fields.label: Malu adibu mua kumonangana nawu
fields.helper: Adrese wa e-mail anyi dîna dia muntu wa mu Discord bua kumulonda.
fields.placeholder: Adresse e-mail anyi adresse wa Discord

fields.label: Muakulu
fields.helper: Muakulu uudi musue, bikalabi ne mushinga.

fields.label: Ntshilumbu kayi tshiudi ukeba bua kujikija?

fields.name: Bantu badibu bakuate
fields.label: Mbanganyi badibu bakuata?
fields.helper: Kuenza nunku kudi mua kuambuluisha nganyi?

fields.name: extraMalu adi mu tshiena-bualu
fields.label: Tshiena-bualu tshikuabu
fields.helper: Umvuija bualu bukuabu buonso budi buambuluisha bua kumvuija dijinga edi: bua tshinyi didi ne mushinga, bilejilu, mvese, lungenyi lukese lua programe, anyi malu adi atangila dîba dia kuenza mudimu.

fields.name: OpenSourceConsent (Ditabuja dia ku budisuile)
fields.label: Udiku udiumvua bimpe bua kuenza mudimu ne mikanda ya bantu bonso anyi?
fields.helper: Malu adibu bitabe bua kuenza adi mu mikanda ya bantu bonso idibu babikila ne: IATF.

items: tshilaminu tshia bantu bonso mu bulongolodi bua IATF GitHub
muenjinere udi ne bujitu bua mudimu eu
mukanda wa dianyisha wa copyleft bua code ne bintu bia mudimu
Malu adibu balongolole bua bantu bonso mu tshilaminu
difunda dia mikanda mu site wa IATF

header.title: Udi mua kutuadija ne dilomba dikese kadi ditoke

paragraphs: Biwikala ne dijinga dilelela dia mushindu wa kupeta mikanda ne umona ne: bidi bikengela bua ikale mudimu wa bantu bonso, ututuminewu.
